faqs.answer: Our fly control services in Teaneck range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We handle all common fly species in Teaneck including house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and cluster flies. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for long-lasting control.
